name: hud_ui_widget_draw
description: HudUiWidget::Draw dirty-rect and whole-widget image draw behavior.
known_limits: No VC byte target currently covers 0x4b3fb0, so Binary-safe remains false.
Binary Ninja retains a limited reconstruction marker because the dirty-rect loop renders with split synthetic loop-counter variables and the DrawBase dispatch is an indirect ftable call.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x4b3fb0 validate the null-image return, four-slot dirty-rect loop, per-slot BlitToActiveTarget calls, framesRemaining decrement, dirtyRectCount decrement on expiry, exclusive draw-image gate, DrawBase ftable dispatch, and whole-widget image blit.
The native smoke verifies null-image and exclusive-image early returns, DrawBase dispatch plus whole-image blit arguments, and dirty-rect blits with countdown/decrement behavior.
